dashboard.title: Producer Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time surveillance and agronomic vision
dashboard.header-description: Monitor your plots, health indicators and active agricultural risks
dashboard.plot-overview-description: Detailed satellite view and indicators for the selected plot
dashboard.empty-alerts-msg: No critical alerts found in the database.
dashboard.analysis-subtitle: Vegetation Vigor Index vs. Accumulated Cold Portions
dashboard.insufficient-records-msg: Insufficient records for this period or plot.
dashboard.ndvi-risk-tooltip: Analysis based on the latest satellite NDVI telemetry across all registered plots.

myPlots.subtitle: Manage your registered plots, boundaries, monitoring status, and linked devices.
myPlots.empty: No plots registered yet. Add your first plot to start monitoring.

kpi.registeredPlotsCaption: Productive areas linked to climate and satellite monitoring.
kpi.climateLinkedCaption: All plots are receiving zonal weather data.

plotCreate.title: Create plot
plotCreate.subtitle: Define the geographic boundary of your plot to enable satellite and climate monitoring.

edit.title: Edit plot
edit.subtitle: Update the plot details and boundary. Changes are saved to the selected plot.

info.title: Plot information
info.subtitle: Basic data used to identify and classify your productive area.
info.areaNote: Area will be computed automatically once you close the boundary on the map.

placeholders.name: Santa Rosa
placeholders.notes: Olive trees under productive stage, regular irrigation schedule.

boundary.title: Draw plot boundary
boundary.subtitle: Click on the map to add boundary points. Close the polygon to register the plot.
boundary.tokenMissing: Set VITE_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN to enable the interactive satellite map and place search.
boundary.incompleteBody: The plot cannot be registered until the geographic polygon is closed correctly. Click Close polygon or add the missing point to complete the boundary.
boundary.autoLinkNote: Once registered, climate and satellite monitoring will be automatically linked to this boundary.
boundary.registerTooSmall: Register plot — area must be at least 1 ha
boundary.tooSmallBody: This boundary is {area} ha. Satellite monitoring requires a plot of at least 1 hectare, so draw a larger area before registering.

guide.title: Plot Boundary Tutorial
guide.subtitle: Learn how to draw your plot boundary in three simple steps.

step1.title: Orient with compass
step1.desc: Use the map compass to orient yourself. Rotate the map to better visualize your plot's geographic location.

step2.title: Mark the corners
step2.desc: Click on the map to place markers at each corner of your plot boundary. Each click adds a boundary point.

step3.title: Confirm the boundary
step3.desc: Once all corners are marked, close the polygon to calculate the area and register your plot.

guide.reassure: You can edit the boundary anytime after registration.

confirm.title: Plot registered successfully
confirm.subtitle: {name} has been registered and linked to climate monitoring for the selected geographic area.
confirm.note: First NDVI analysis may take up to 24 hours while satellite imagery is processed for your boundary.

plotImport.title: Import coordinates
plotImport.subtitle: Import plot boundaries from coordinate files.

plotDetail.title: Plot Detail
plotDetail.subtitle: Review plot configuration, registered boundary, monitoring links, and connected devices.

boundary.title: Registered boundary
boundary.subtitle: This boundary is used to retrieve satellite indicators and local climate data.
boundary.note: No NDVI overlay — open dashboard view for analysis.

config.title: Configuration summary
config.subtitle: Active integrations and setup status for this plot.

devices.title: Linked IoT devices
devices.subtitle: Sensors connected to {name} for real-time telemetry.
devices.empty: No IoT devices linked to this plot yet.

delete.title: Delete plot
delete.body: This permanently deletes "{name}" and unlinks its satellite and climate monitoring. This action cannot be undone.
delete.confirmLabel: Type the plot name to confirm

dynamicNutrition.subtitle: Review the compensatory nutrition plan generated from phenological risk alerts and certify field application.

empty.title: No active nutrition plan
empty.body: There is no active compensatory plan for {plot}. Generate one from the latest alert and monitoring indicators.
empty.hint: A compensatory plan is only generated when the plot's climate risk is high.

cards.activePlanNote: Generated from the latest risk alert.

rationale.title: Plan rationale
rationale.subtitle: Why the system generated this compensatory plan.
rationale.note: This plan was generated by Viora using the active alert and recent monitoring indicators.

window.title: Application window
window.subtitle: The optimal window updates when the forecast changes.
window.note: Window may update if forecast conditions change before execution.

exec.title: Plan execution
exec.subtitle: Certification and financial declaration are mandatory to close the nutrition intervention.

certifyModal.title: Certify application
certifyModal.subtitle: Register the exact date and inputs applied in field.
certifyModal.note: This certification updates the plot history and feeds the predictive engine with executed actions.

expenseModal.title: Register mitigation expense
expenseModal.subtitle: Declare costs associated with the nutrition plan.
expenseModal.note: The intervention cannot be closed until the financial declaration is registered.

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.message: This producer workspace is being prepared. We are wiring it to the Viora platform and it will be available shortly.
comingSoon.subtitle: This producer workspace is being prepared.
comingSoon.subtitle-my-plots: Manage and review your registered plots.
comingSoon.subtitle-dynamic-nutrition: Plan and certify dynamic nutrition recommendations.

comingSoon.subtitle-subscription: Manage plan details and billing configuration.
comingSoon.subtitle-settings: Configure your dashboard and workspace preferences.
comingSoon.subtitle-support: Access help resources for the producer dashboard.
comingSoon.subtitle-specialist-requests: Your request history is being prepared and will be available shortly.
comingSoon.subtitle-specialist-field-inspection: Field inspection tools are being prepared and will be available shortly.

iot-devices.title: IoT Devices
iot-devices.subtitle: Monitor and manage your IoT device network
iot-devices.form-subtitle: Configure device parameters and telemetry thresholds
iot-devices.confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?

errors.occurred: An error occurred. Please try again.

surveillance.pest-surveillance-description: Monitor pest and disease surveillance reports.

zonal.empty: No zonal risks detected right now.

performance.title: Accepted cases performance

kpis.contactFoot: Producers see your public profile before a proposal is accepted.

producers.title: Incoming cases
producers.subtitle: Producer cases routed to you and awaiting a response

log.title: Case log
log.subtitle: Tabular index of the same incoming cases

modal.title: Send proposal
modal.subtitle: Submit a service proposal for this case

profile.phoneRequiredError: Phone number is required for specialist marketplace profiles.
profile.baseLocationHint: Used to rank nearby producer assistance requests.
profile.serviceTagsHint: Choose the services producers can match against. Values are saved as backend keywords.
profile.serviceRadiusHint: Producers inside this distance can discover your specialist profile.
profile.marketplaceVisible: Show my profile in the specialist marketplace
profile.marketplaceVisibleHint: Turn this off to hide your public specialist listing without deleting your profile data.

locationPicker.title: Set base location
locationPicker.subtitle: Search, click the map, or drag the marker to place your specialist service area.
locationPicker.unavailable: Set VITE_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN to enable the interactive map and place search.
locationPicker.searchPlaceholder: Search a city, valley, or address
locationPicker.pickHint: Pick a point on the map

specialist.plusTagline: Stay discoverable for nearby growers and manage specialist opportunities from one place.
specialist.proTagline: Annual specialist plan with stronger marketplace positioning and Pro badge eligibility.
specialist.proBadgeReady: Pro badge ready for your specialist profile.
specialist.proBadgeLocked: Upgrade to Specialist Pro to unlock the Pro badge.

features.opportunityFeed: Opportunity feed for producer assistance requests
features.fieldContext: Producer plot, risk, and field context before contact
features.fasterConnection: Faster connection with producers who need help
features.proBadge: Pro badge on your specialist marketplace card

plot.title: Register your first plot
plot.description: Draw your field boundary so monitoring can start.

dashboard.title: Return to Dashboard
dashboard.description: Review your plot health and climate overview.

expert.title: Visit Expert Assistance
expert.description: Know where to request specialist support.

profile.title: Complete your specialist profile
profile.description: Set your location and service tags so producers can find you.

spDashboard.title: Review your dashboard
spDashboard.description: Check your KPIs, zonal radar and incoming requests.

marketplace.title: Explore the Marketplace
marketplace.description: Discover producer requests and send your proposals.

overall.title: Overall plot health
overall.description: This summarizes the general condition of your registered plots so you can quickly spot whether the farm is stable or needs review.

ndvi.title: NDVI status
ndvi.description: This card shows vegetation vigor from satellite imagery. It helps you notice stress signals before they become visible in the field.

chill.title: Chill accumulation
chill.description: This tracks cold-hour progress for the campaign, useful for understanding flowering risk and seasonal development.

yield.title: Yield forecast
yield.description: This estimates production outlook and risk so you can connect monitoring signals with expected harvest performance.

plotOverview.title: Plot overview
plotOverview.description: This is the main working area for your selected plot: map, health status, phenological risk, latest NDVI, and recommended actions.

spResolved.title: Resolved interventions
spResolved.description: How many cases you closed this month — your core activity as a specialist on the platform.

spAcceptance.title: Acceptance rate
spAcceptance.description: The share of your proposals that producers accept. A healthy rate means your offers land well.

spPhyto.title: Phytosanitary efficiency
spPhyto.description: How effective your interventions are at controlling the reported threats across the fields you serve.

spZonal.title: Zonal risk radar
spZonal.description: Nearby outbreaks and risks ranked by distance, so you know where demand for your expertise is rising.

spIncoming.title: Incoming requests
spIncoming.description: New assistance requests from producers — verify or decline them here, or open the Marketplace to send a proposal.

auth.login-headline-satellite: See every plot, alert and intervention in one view
auth.login-headline-soil: Track soil health and field visits without leaving your dashboard
auth.login-headline-intervention: Plan interventions before risk becomes damage
